summary: Iteration 95 - Testing AI Insights (OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM Key), Customer Pagination, and Mobile Responsive improvements. Backend: 12/12 passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with AI insights generating successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Insights endpoints correctly implemented in routers/ai_insights.py using litellm with gpt-4.1-mini model
Customer pagination correctly returns {data, total, page, limit, pages} format
AIInsightsWidget.jsx on Dashboard has 3 buttons (Business Health, Stock Alerts, Sales Trends) with data-testid attributes
StockReorderPage.jsx includes AI Stock Analysis card with Generate button
SalesForecastPage.jsx includes AI Sales Analysis card with Generate button
ActivityLogsPage.jsx responsive columns: Resource hidden on mobile (sm:table-cell), Details hidden on mobile/tablet (md:table-cell), IP hidden until large screens (lg:table-cell)
Fixed customers-balance endpoint KeyError by using .get() instead of direct bracket access

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly with AI features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 verified: 1) GET /api/ai-insights/dashboard returns AI business insight with metrics (this_week_revenue, growth_pct, expenses, profit, outstanding_credit), 2) GET /api/ai-insights/stock returns AI stock analysis with critical_count and total_items, 3) GET /api/ai-insights/sales-trends returns AI sales trend analysis with period='30 days', 4) GET /api/customers returns paginated format {data, total, page, limit, pages}, 5) Dashboard has AIInsightsWidget with 3 buttons working correctly, 6) Sales Forecast page has AI Sales Analysis card, 7) Stock Reorder page has AI Stock Analysis card, 8) Activity Logs page has responsive columns (Resource hidden on mobile). Fixed customers-balance endpoint KeyError bug.

GET /api/ai-insights/sales-trends.note: AI-generated sales trend analysis with 30-day period

GET /api/customers-balance.note: Fixed KeyError by using .get() for customer id and name

Dashboard AI Insights Widget.note: AI insight displays after clicking button with ~5-10 second response time

Stock Reorder Page.ai_card: AI Stock Analysis card with Generate button

Sales Forecast Page.ai_card: AI Sales Analysis card with Refresh button

Customers Page.note: Loads correctly with paginated customer data

Sales Page.note: Loads correctly after customer pagination change

Invoices Page.note: Loads correctly after customer pagination change

POS Page.note: Loads correctly after customer pagination change

responsive_columns.IP Address: hidden lg:table-cell - hidden until large screens

customers_balance_endpoint.issue: KeyError when customer document lacks 'id' field
customers_balance_endpoint.fix: Changed customer['id'] to customer.get('id') with continue for null ids, customer['name'] to customer.get('name', 'Unknown')
